title: KX-04: Secondary surfaces refit to the shared design system
description: Mechanical application packets: each takes exactly one post-KX-03 surface and refits it to the shared primitives (ui/Button, ui/Card, ui/StatusBadge, ui/AsyncState, shared/WorkCard) and canonical tokens, killing bespoke one-off styling. All packets are FREE-tier by design - the spec is the shared component library plus KITTY.md; the work is substitution, not invention. One surface per packet, screenshot diff noted in every PR, no packet may touch another surface's files. All depend on KX-03-02 (view collapse) so they refit the merged surfaces, not the dead ones. Every packet inherits the global bar: min 12px text, unified border radius and spacing scale per KX-01-04, empty states via the shared EmptyState, loading via LoadingSkeleton/AsyncState, mobile-correct at 320px and 375px per KX-01-05, keyboard/ARIA baseline per KX-01-06.

packets.title: Work surface (merged tasks+todos) on WorkCard end-to-end
packets.objective: Refit the merged Work surface: every task and todo renders as a shared WorkCard with StatusBadge; add/edit/complete flows use ui/Dialog and ui/Button; filters are one segmented control; delete all bespoke card, badge, and list styling left over from TaskPanel/TodoPanel. Empty and loading states via shared components only.
acceptance_criteria: Zero component-local card/badge CSS remains in the Work surface files
Complete/skip actions persist and reflect in the Home resume view (KX-01-03 wiring intact)
320px layout has no horizontal scroll and touch targets are at least 40px
make ui-test passes; npm run build passes; before/after screenshots in PR

packets.title: Builder surface refit (965 lines) to shared primitives
packets.objective: BuilderSurface.tsx is the second-largest component in the app and predates the shared library. Refit: initiative and packet rows become WorkCards with StatusBadge mapped from queue states; action buttons become ui/Button; confirmation flows become ui/Dialog; long log/detail output gets a collapsible mono block consistent with KX-02 tool cards. Preserve read-only semantics from PR 183 - this packet changes presentation only, zero behavioral or API changes.
acceptance_criteria: Every Builder queue state renders through StatusBadge's vocabulary, no bespoke status colors
No behavioral diff: identical API calls before/after (assert in test or note request log in PR)
BuilderSurface.tsx shrinks by at least 250 lines from primitive reuse
make ui-test passes; npm run build passes; before/after screenshots in PR

packets.title: Studio surface (merged images+studio) refit
packets.objective: Refit the merged Studio surface: generation form controls to ui primitives; gallery grid to a consistent card treatment with ArtifactCard image type; job progress via StatusBadge and AsyncState; empty gallery via shared EmptyState. ImageGenPanel's duplicated form logic folds into ImageStudio tabs rather than living twice.
acceptance_criteria: One generation form implementation remains (grep proves no duplicated submit logic)
Gallery items render via ArtifactCard image type with provenance
In-flight generations show live StatusBadge state
make ui-test passes; npm run build passes; before/after screenshots in PR

packets.title: Library surface (merged projects+docs) refit
packets.objective: Refit the merged Library surface: projects and documents render as ArtifactCards (document/report/code types) with a type filter; open/preview flows via ui/Dialog; search input matches the global input treatment. Kill the two divergent list styles inherited from ProjectsPanel and DocumentsPanel.
acceptance_criteria: Projects and documents share one list/card implementation with a type filter
Preview opens in ui/Dialog with keyboard dismiss and focus return
Empty and loading states via shared components only
make ui-test passes; npm run build passes; before/after screenshots in PR

packets.title: Settings surface (merged settings+providers) refit
packets.objective: Refit the merged Settings surface: tabbed sections (General, Providers, Skills, Advanced); ProviderCenter becomes the Providers tab with provider health via StatusBadge; theme toggle, model selection, and unrouted agents/tools/tutor entries live here per KX-03-02. Every form control uses ui primitives; destructive actions confirm via ui/Dialog.
acceptance_criteria: Providers reachable only via Settings tab; provider health uses StatusBadge vocabulary
Skills tab lists the unrouted agents/tools/tutor entries with a working launch path
No bespoke form styling remains in Settings files
make ui-test passes; npm run build passes; before/after screenshots in PR

packets.title: Closing coherence audit against the KFX-001 bar
packets.objective: Final sweep after KX-04-01 through KX-04-05: walk all 7 surfaces and verify the KFX-001 test - does the product feel coherent, not is the feature wired. Produce docs/plans/KX_COHERENCE_AUDIT.md listing per surface: token compliance (grep for raw hex outside tokens), primitive usage, empty/loading/error state presence, 320px behavior, and any remaining bespoke styling with a fix-or-accept decision each. Fix only trivial items inline (single-line token swaps); anything larger becomes a listed follow-up, not scope creep.
acceptance_criteria: Audit doc covers all 7 surfaces with explicit pass/fix/accept per criterion
Repo-wide grep for 6-digit hex in src/components returns only tokens-file references or documented accepts
Any inline fixes are single-line token/primitive swaps, listed in the PR body
make ui-test passes; npm run build passes
